mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals expanding output capacity and robust economic activity, which boosts corporate earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If rolling 3-year rank IC of INDPRO growth versus 20d forward returns is below 0.05, or if decile spread tests fail to show monotonic positive relationship.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate rising above 4.0% signals labor market weakening and reduced consumer spending, leading to lower corporate earnings and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If forward 60-day returns following UNRATE > 4.0% are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.1) or hit rate < 55%.

mechanism_narrative: When the fed funds rate exceeds year-over-year CPI inflation, real interest rates become positive, tightening financial conditions and reducing equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the real rate signal (FEDFUNDS - CPI YoY) has rank IC below 0.03 or if positive returns occur in >50% of triggered events.

mechanism_narrative: During post-recession recoveries characterized by accelerating GDP growth, strong retail sales growth above 0.5% month-over-month signals strengthening consumer demand that drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If the regime condition (GDPC1 accelerating) is not reliably identified or if the signal yields non-positive returns in >60% of occurrences within that regime.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above historical norms erodes purchasing power and compresses profit margins, leading to negative real returns for equities over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If the rolling 5-year correlation between CPI level changes and forward 60-day returns is not negative, or if the strategy's Sharpe ratio over 10 years is negative.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above 1,500 thousand units signal a robust housing market and construction activity, which stimulates economic growth and lifts equity prices over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the average forward 20-day return after trigger events is not positive and significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When nonfarm payrolls grow by over 200,000 jobs and unemployment remains below 4.5%, the labor market is tight and expanding, boosting consumer confidence and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If the combined signal's hit rate for positive 5-day returns is below 60% or if the signal fails to beat a buy-and-hold on a risk-adjusted basis over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In the early-cycle expansion phase when industrial production is above 110 (index 2017=100) and GDP growth is above trend, rising production signals accelerating economic momentum that drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: early-cycle expansion (GDPC1 above trend, FEDFUNDS low)
failure_condition: If the early-cycle regime cannot be reliably identified ex-ante, or if the signal yields negative returns in more than 40% of occurrences within that regime.
